rationale: The one substantive ground-truth concern (yenuo26's inline comment questioning whether the new device_communicator/reduce_scatter test assertions are complete) is directly echoed by Candidate X's finding that _TP is missing the same device_communicator/reduce_scatter assertions added for _PCP/_DP/_EP — a grounded, concrete, file:line-anchored catch. Candidate Y never touches test-coverage completeness at all and lands on a clean APPROVE with only a speculative caching-comment nit. X's other findings (missing docstring, stale comments, cpu_group precondition) are all grounded in the diff, correctly labeled minor, and specific enough to act on, giving it better recall and actionability at comparable precision; Y's single finding is valid but vaguer and less tied to a real diff risk.
